items.example: Long time no see, how have you been?
items.exampleTranslation: 好久不见，你过得怎么样？

items.example: Excuse me, where is the bathroom?
items.exampleTranslation: 打扰一下，洗手间在哪里？

items.example: Nice to meet you, I'm Li Wei
items.exampleTranslation: 认识你很高兴，我是李伟

items.example: Have a safe trip back home
items.exampleTranslation: 一路平安，回家路上小心

items.example: My son is ten years old
My uncle works at a hospital
My cousin got married last month

items.exampleTranslation: 外孙每个周末都来看望

items.example: My son is six years old

items.exampleTranslation: 日落把天空染成了金色

items.example: I like eating tofu with rice

items.example: He wears a suit to work every day

items.example: The police officer protects the city

items.example: She suffers from anxiety before tests
